primaryGoal: help operators scan system health, spot anomalies, and act quickly
componentPreferences: React Aria for accessible custom patterns

libraryRoute.reason: framework fit for Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, source-first delivery mode, dashboard product shape, Tailwind-friendly path

layoutDirection: left navigation, wide workspace, compact top filters, right-side detail drawer
colorDirection: charcoal base with cool neutral surfaces and one cyan action accent
typographyDirection: clean grotesk sans for UI with a tighter data-oriented scale
motionDirection: short purposeful reveals, panel slides, subtle chart transitions
acceptanceCriteria: operators can understand state in under 10 seconds
critical alerts are obvious without scrolling
layout remains stable with long labels
